details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: ✈【AIRLINE APPROVED】Fit for most Airlines. But every airline has a specific set of rules and regulations, please contact with airline before flying with your pet.
🐶【Excellent Air Flow】Top and side mesh panels for ventilation; top zipper closures;

😻【Purse-like Design】BETOP HOUSE Soft-Sided Pet Carrier Purses were specially designed for Morkie, Yorkie, Chihuahua, Maltipoo and any dogs and cats with their size. The stylish design made the pet carrier just like a nice purse. You could take your pets to anywhere without it being noticed.
🐕【Extra Pocket for Treats & Small Things】Two lock closure pockets on the front; Removable soft base insert;

🐱【Security】There's a durable hook inside the purse which connect to the pet collar which make your pets be secured. No more worry about pets running out when you open doors untill you release him/her.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier trendy and well-designed, with good quality and durability. The bag fits comfortably under airline seats and is spacious enough for small dogs, with one customer noting it's big enough for a six-pound puppy. The zipper quality receives mixed feedback, with several customers reporting that it isn't super secure and some mentioning it broke within seconds of use. Customers appreciate the pockets, with one mentioning they can hold a retractable leash, though stability is a concern as the bag isn't secure enough to prevent pets from escaping.

insights.summary: Customers like the appearance of the pet carrier, describing it as pretty, trendy, and well-designed.

examples.snippet: This is a good product; it’s cute and well made. However I don’t recommend it if you’re trying to hide your pets incognito in the bag....

adorable and no chemical smell, but its very "plastic" not a patent leather look. But it cleans up nicely.

Super pretty & the pockets are great. .....
...Love the pockets on the side and came nicely packaged. Only downside is not very comfortable on the sholder.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!
authors_reviews.text: I LOVE the size of this bag, our 5 lb Shih-tzu fits perfectly with plenty of room to stand if she wants to. There is plenty of ventilation and the look of the bag itself is beautiful. Far better than the briefcase looking ones. From far away it would look like just a regular handbag. I got this in black, but also need to get the white one to switch off with seasons/ outfits! If your pup fits, you won't be disappointed with this one!
authors_reviews.author: Berniece Matiesse

authors_reviews.title: My chiuahua loves it
authors_reviews.text: Elegant, sturdy bag. My chiui is 2 kg and 1/2 so even a smaller size could be okay, but I got this one as I like he has more space. He loves the bag and jumps into every time he sees it.Very nice bag and cheap price, the only negative side is that the zipper doesn’t fully close (there is a pressure button at the end of the zipper ) and my dog is able to open it, if he pushes it with his nose.Overall, a great and elegant bag, the same bag in a normal store would cost a lot more
authors_reviews.author: PS

authors_reviews.title: IT IS GORGEOUS, but..
authors_reviews.text: My cat runs like hell when she sees this bag or hears the leash (I am new to cat ownership and she's my ESA while I fight cancer, so work with me). I don't know if that's common with all cats, etc. Once she's in, I love how the sides of the bag provide air and unadulterated eye contact between us. I only ever take her to the vet in that bag, and wish I could find the energy to keep catching her.The product lost a star because of a design error -- it's difficult to keep the sides rolled up because the connection button/apparatus has a weak bond. Speaking of weak: if you don't zip the top all of the way, your boneless cat will *huuahh* (to jump without regard for one's own life) right out of the bag, into only God knows what. ALWAYS ZIP IT UP COMPLETELY.Otherwise, the design is to die for and is easily matched with tons of outfits. Once my cat stops whining about being in her travel bag (she's has dwarfism and is stuck looking very kitty-ish), she has plenty of room, she'll calm down and even purr. In the vet, she even prefers the carrier bag to whatever the doctors have going on. I would still recommend this to other 'furbaby moms'. 4.5/5*should update with pctures
authors_reviews.author: #TamarahStrong

authors_reviews.title: Great quality very sturdy
authors_reviews.text: My Maltese is about 13-15 pounds so I was concerned if he would fit well enough because most dogs you see in bags are teacups and toys but I was happy to find that he fits so perfect it’s still very roomy in there for him. I was also pleasantly surprised that when you pick the bag up the lining on the bottom is sturdy enough for it not to bend or cave one bit! So perfect and cute. Exactly what we were looking for!
authors_reviews.author: DG

authors_reviews.title: Great for my 10lb shihtzu!
authors_reviews.text: I take my dog everywhere and this bag is perfect. He’s 10lbs and fluffy , the bag has enough room for him to lay down comfortably or turn around . It’s easy to clean. I take him traveling planes trains and automobiles, the bag is a perfect size. It be cool if it had an attachment to keel the top open , like a buckle or something . 8/10 good dog purse .
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: WARNING...Cat pushed through edge and got out!
authors_reviews.text: This is really cute and we were so excited to use it. The second time we did, our 10 week old kitten quickly and easily pushed his head then body right out the end that you zipper and button shut! We couldn't believe it and thought we must have not sealed it right so we put him back in and made sure it was zipped all the way and snapped and he did it again immediately! So thankful this happened right when we put him in it and went to leave versus when we got outside or we could have lost our kitty! This is a serious flaw and if a little kitten is able to loosen the snap and zipper so quickly and easily as to push through then an adult cat can do so. No, he isn't so small that he could just get through the gap, he pushed and loosened the end that easily and quickly! This needs a far better seal at the end! Scary and unfortunate as it is so nice looking but we through away the packaging and now I am stuck with a $50 worthless purse I don't feel safe transporting our kitty in.
authors_reviews.author: 3Stac5

authors_reviews.title: Zipper broke 2 seconds before I was to board the plane!
authors_reviews.text: I had used this to travel with my dog recently. It is a great size, great storage, great material on the sides, and I love the look of it. It is great to conceal my dog if I run in to a store...however, when the Zipper failed just as I was to board the plane, I was put in a great bind. I was not allowed to board and I had no choice but to buy the airline's dog carrier for and inflated price. I would love to use this carrier again if I knew the zipper was made better.
authors_reviews.author: Tami Wilson

authors_reviews.title: My Shih Tzu loves this pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: My Shih Tzu loves it. She fits in it perfect and it’s comfortable to hold her in compared to most carriers we had I really love this carrier. She weighs about 16 pounds. She doesn’t have to leave the top open for her, but it could close to but she has no room to turn but I only use this carrier to go to the grocery store in other areas and most times I leave the top open for her head to stick out so it works fine for us Sidenote Shih Tzu are long dogs almost as long as a Dawson my Shih Tzu dog is 2 1/2 years old and she is full-size, but she is a full breed if your Shih Tzu is a mix and a little bit smaller you’re a dog will fit even better than mines, but if your Shih Tzu is mixed with a bigger dog, it might be a good fit for your dog
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: BEST PURCHASE
other_countries_reviews.text: This bag is everything I had hoped it would be! My small 5lb maltipoo jumps right in and feels so secure in this bag! It is so cute and people don’t think it is a doggy bag (pun intended) I love the button closures on the pockets. I never fear anything will fall out! Sturdy stitching and grommets seem strong (I am very rough with my bag when not in use). Fits my iPhone and keys and leash. Overall it is perfect for us!
other_countries_reviews.author: Sangeeta

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog carrier/bag
other_countries_reviews.text: Exactly as described, good size I have a toy poodle lots of room. Use it when we go shopping to the Mall so very handy just leave her head sticking out of the top so she is very happy
other_countries_reviews.author: Gina

other_countries_reviews.title: It is expensive but I really liked it
other_countries_reviews.author: ABud

other_countries_reviews.title: Es algo más grande de lo que pensé pero me gusto
other_countries_reviews.text: Me encanto, excelente material y un diseño bello
other_countries_reviews.author: Karyme carrera

other_countries_reviews.title: Very stylish!
other_countries_reviews.text: Bunny loves his bag, pockets are useful, easy to enter places incognito. Must secure the snap to keep puppy in - a persistent pup can manage but it’s only happened to me once (I had not secured it well). Highly recommend
other_countries_reviews.author: Sash
